## Summary

Makes the Workbench **Write custom** path active so users can test author-controlled custom revisions on the website.

## Changes

- Adds an author draft panel opened by **Write custom**.
- Seeds the draft textarea with the currently selected A/B/C proposal.
- Updates the draft if the user changes selected proposal while the panel is open.
- Adds **Save custom revision** and **Reset to selected proposal** actions.
- Records saved custom text in the session log.
- Records accepted option labels for accepted decisions.
- Resets draft state when moving to another opportunity or after saving a decision.

## Scope

Prototype/workbench UI only. No database, persistence, manuscript mutation, export, TrustedPath runtime, or evaluation logic changed.

## Test path

Open `/workbench`, select a repair opportunity, click **Write custom**, edit the draft, and click **Save custom revision**. The session log should record the custom decision and custom text.
